title: Overweight Animals
description: Adds fat variants of vanilla animals, which drop more loot and are clumsy.
body:
Use code **Radboi** to get 25% off your first month with [Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/Radboi)
![Bisect Hosting discount](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1dad3ad79a9c79b75b0a86ae03e5f6b3befe928_0.webp)

## What does the mod add?
This mod adds an overweight cow, sheep, pig, chicken, rabbit and horse variant, with each of them dropping more loot than the normal mob.

 
## How do I get the animals?
Overweight animals can rarely spawn by breeding their normal counterparts.

 

When breeding Overweight animals, they can rarely spawn the vanilla baby mob instead of an overweight one.

 

### All the different overweight animals:


![All the different Overweight Animals currently](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c770d11bf2d0e4daa0065c908a3e2fa18be1ea10.png)


 


You are free to use this mod in a modpack, but please credit me if you make a video with this mod.

  

If someone makes a good mod showcase with my mod, just tell me about it and I will happily link it down below.

  

If you have any suggestions or questions, feel free to put them in the comments.
